name: AltImageListResponse
description: Response envelope returning a list of image objects each containing a URL and alt text.

message.description: List of image objects with URL and alt text.

items.description: A dog image URL paired with descriptive alt text suitable for accessibility.

altText.description: Human-readable alt text describing the image (typically "{Sub-breed} {breed} dog").

status.description: Outcome marker; "success" when the request succeeded.
